title: ASO — Agentic Search Optimization | CAPXEL | CAPXEL
content: CAPXEL — AI-Native Consumer IntelligenceYour Customers Are Asking AI Where to Buy. Is It Recommending You?Agentic Search Optimization - the practice of making your brand discoverable to AI agents. CAPXEL authored the standard.Test Your Site FreeTalk to Our TeamThe iceberg is real: most signal is hidden beneath the surface.The ProblemAI Agents Can't Parse Visual WebsitesMost brand websites were built for humans: visual layouts, navigation menus, interactions, and design cues. AI agents extract and verify information - and they need stable, structured signals.Audit insight~73% of brand websites are effectively invisible to LLMs.CAPXEL ASO DiagnosticsTraditional SEO optimizes for humans and search engines. ASO optimizes for the AI agents that increasingly influence what humans buy - by giving agents an authoritative source of truth.What Is ASO?Agentic Search Optimization is a new layer of discoverability: the systems that recommend brands are no longer only search engines - they are AI agents. CAPXEL coined the term ASO in November 2025.Optimized for human readersTraditional SEOFocuses on SERP rankings and human click-throughContent is written and laid out for visual scanningMetadata is often inconsistent across pagesGreat for search engines - not enough for agentsOptimized for AI agentsASO (Agentic Search Optimization)Makes your business legible to LLM-driven agentsPublishes machine-readable business intelligenceCreates consistent, verifiable structured signalsDesigned for the AI layer influencing purchase decisionsThe StandardLLM-LD: How AI Discovers BusinessesCAPXEL authored the LLM-LD standard - a machine-readable specification that defines how AI agents identify, verify, and recommend businesses.Trust SignalsStructured policy, warranty, shipping, returns, and verification signals - so agents can confidently recommend you.Entity ConsistencyOne coherent business identity across pages and channels - making it easier for agents to resolve “who you are”.Agent ReadabilityPurpose-built formats and endpoints that agents can fetch, parse, and cite - independent of UI and layout.View the LLM-LD Standard How It WorksWhite-glove implementation. We don’t “do marketing” - we give your marketing team a machine-readable foundation that agents can recognize and trust.01AuditWe scan your entire web presence - site, subdomains, key pages, and entity signals - to understand what an AI agent can (and can't) extract today.02OptimizeWe build a machine-readable intelligence layer: product, policy, location, and brand signals expressed in standardized, agent-friendly formats.03DeployWe deploy via an AI endpoint (typically ai.yourdomain.com) so agents have a reliable source of truth - versioned, consistent, and always accessible.ResultsASO outputs are measurable: structured intelligence, consistent entity signals, and an agent-ready endpoint.5Industries optimized1,956Machine-readable files generatedUp to 7Structured schemas per page60sTime to run the ASO testThe outcome: agents can answer “where to buy” with confidence.When your intelligence layer is consistent, verifiable, and easy to fetch, AI systems are more likely to include you in recommendations, comparisons, and purchase guidance.Run the Free TestTalk to CAPXELProve It's WorkingASO optimizes. BEACON proves it.Every time GPTBot, ClaudeBot, or PerplexityBot crawls your AI layer, BEACON captures it. Monthly intelligence reports show exactly which AI systems are reading your brand, how often, and what they care about. Data you literally cannot get anywhere else.Learn About BEACON ASO DiagnosticsCan AI Find Your Business? Find out in 60 seconds.CAPXEL is a white-glove data consultancy. We build the structured layer so your team can own discoverability in an AI-first world.Test Your Site FreeTalk to Our TeamRelated products: BEACON · SPYBOX · INSPEX · PROSPEXFAQEverything you need to know about Agentic Search Optimization.What is Agentic Search Optimization (ASO)?Why does ASO matter now - if I already do SEO?Where does the "73% invisible to LLMs" claim come from?What is LLM-LD?What exactly do you deploy to my domain?Who is ASO best for?How do I know ASO is actually working?
